title: Alternate English names for the Evangelion characters
display_title: Alternate English names for the Evangelion characters
wikitext:
[]: Alternate English names for the Evangelion characters?             Quote Post by Leighton » Sun Mar 06, 2011 8:40 am Just out of interest, and its probably been discussed before, but what english names would you give each character in evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Sun Mar 06, 2011 9:25 am Shinji = Kevin Asuka = Sarah Rei = Ray Misato = Rebecca Gendo = Hansol Ritsuko = Angie Mari = Mary That's all I've got at the moment...

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Mar 06, 2011 10:21 am Shinji = Charlie Brown

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Mar 06, 2011 10:22 am Xard wrote: Shinji = Charlie Brown

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Mar 06, 2011 10:29 am Shogo-Kun wrote: Gendo = Hansol

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sun Mar 06, 2011 10:50 am Xard wrote: Shinji = Charlie Brown

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Mar 06, 2011 11:03 am Shinji = Lee Asuka = Lee Rei = Lee Misato = Lee Gendo = Lee Ritsuko = Lee Mari = Lee

[]:             Quote Post by Cody MacArthur Fett » Sun Mar 06, 2011 11:24 am English names? Well let's see now . . . Shinji Ikari = Johnathan Grafton Asuka Langley Sohryu = Margret Washington Cannning Rei Ayanami = Victoria Salisbury Gendo Ikari = Henry Grafton Misato Katsuragi = Flora Balfour Ritsuko Akagi = Elizabeth Churchill Kozo Fuyutsuki = George Bentinck Hikari Horaki = Clementine Lamb Touji Suzahara = William Gladstone Kensuke Aida = Frederick Grey Yui Ikari = Anne Grafton That's all I can think of right now.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 06, 2011 11:39 am I'll just leave this here.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Sun Mar 06, 2011 12:41 pm ^ There should be a section of EvaWiki where there's scripts for episodes of NGE written just like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sun Mar 06, 2011 2:24 pm Shinji = Timmy Rei = Felicity Asuka = Lindsay Misato = Pamela Kaji = Brandon Gendo = Isaac Fuyutuski = Charles

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Sun Mar 06, 2011 3:29 pm Keeping with the theme naming... Shinji Ikari would be Nathan Wainwright Rei Ayanami would be Rachel Anderson Asuka Langley Soryu would be Alexandra Langley Scharnhorst Misato Katsuragi would be Melissa Walke Ritsuko Akagi would be Rebbecca Patterson Gendo Ikari would be Matthew Wainwright Yui Ikari would be Elizabeth Wainwright Kozo Fuyustuki would be Eric Frazier Ryoji Kaji would be Jason Stern Toji Suzuhara would be Tim Sterett Kensuke Aida would Ken Morris Makoto Hyuga would be Lucas MacKenzie Maya Ibuki would be Samantha Caldwell Shigeru Aoba would be Robert Benham Hikari Horaki would be Haley Somers Kaworu Nagisa would be Adrien Waters I'm particularly proud of Asuka's new name, to the point where I might actually start calling her that.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sun Mar 06, 2011 4:07 pm Sarah.

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Sun Mar 06, 2011 4:12 pm The next logical step would, of course, be to select your favourite (or one of those least-favourite) fanfic, make a simple find&replace for all those names and see if you still recognize the characters in the story. ...or see how far you can get into reading before bursting into uncontrollable laughter.

[]:             Quote Post by rhfxz1s » Sun Mar 06, 2011 4:38 pm Reichu wrote: I'll just leave this here.

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Sun Mar 06, 2011 5:26 pm Allemann wrote: Rei = Felicity

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun Mar 06, 2011 6:34 pm ^Why?

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel » Sun Mar 06, 2011 11:56 pm child of Lilith wrote: ^Why?

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Mon Mar 07, 2011 1:15 am I see. Thanks for the reply.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Mon Mar 07, 2011 7:11 pm Just came up with a new list: Shinji = Sammy Rei = Ray Asuka = Ariel Toji = Toni Kensuke = Kenni Hikari = Hillary Gendo = Albert Yui = Linda Fuyutsuki = Gerald Ritsuko = Bitch Misato = Rachel Mari = Mary Kaji = David Keel Lorenz = Mutha F**ka
summary:
[]: Alternate English names for the Evangelion characters?             Quote Post by Leighton » Sun Mar 06, 2011 8:40 am Just out of interest, and its probably been discussed before, but what english names would you give each character in evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Sun Mar 06, 2011 9:25 am Shinji = Kevin Asuka = Sarah Rei = Ray Misato = Rebecca Gendo = Hanso
